name: teamflow-lite
description: Lightweight internal team, task and product requirement management.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check feature-api.js && node --check reminder-engine.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/enhancements.js
scripts.test: node tests/smoke.js && node tests/features.js && node tests/reminders.js && node tests/concurrency.js
